plan: 使用 FastQC 进行质量控制：FastQC C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R1.fastq.gz 和 C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R2.fastq.gz

使用 Trimmomatic 去除低质量序列和适配器：Trimmomatic PE C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R1.fastq.gz C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R2.fastq.gz TruSeq3-PE.fa

使用 SPAdes 进行基因组组装：SPAdes -k 21,33,55,77 --meta C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R1_trimmed.fastq.gz C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\data\SRR1234567_R2_trimmed.fastq.gz -o C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7
使用 Quast 评估组装质量：Quast -r Reference.fasta C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\AutoBA-modern\backend\output\task_6c69e1c7\scaffolds.fasta
